summary: Re-invocation of frontend-coding-agent for issue #13 (FR-PERS-001 — Save Model to Browser Storage). Implementation was already complete from prior invocation (022). Verified ActionBar.tsx, Notification.tsx, and persistenceService.ts are fully implemented. PR #48 was created and merged. All 4 test cases (T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04) are satisfied by the implementation.

artifacts.name: ActionBar component
artifacts.description: Save/Load/Export/Import buttons with async handlers, QuotaExceededError handling, auto-dismiss notifications

artifacts.name: Notification component
artifacts.description: Success/error overlay with 3s auto-dismiss, robust error detection via includes('error'), a11y role=status

artifacts.name: persistenceService
artifacts.description: saveModel/loadModel via LocalForage with schema versioning v1.0.0

artifacts.name: PR #48 (merged)
artifacts.description: [area:frontend] Implement FR-PERS-001 Save Model — ActionBar, Notification, persistenceService (#13) — MERGED

recommended_actions: Verify PR #48 was merged correctly at https://github.com/sreenivasmrpivot/legobuilder-challenger-config1/pull/48
Verify ActionBar.tsx handleSave uses try/catch with QuotaExceededError detection
Verify Notification.tsx auto-dismisses after 3s and uses role=status for a11y
Verify persistenceService.ts includes schema version 1.0.0 in PersistedModel
Confirm all 4 test IDs are covered: T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04
Close issue #13 if all acceptance criteria are met
